mapper.select:
SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%') ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.is_requested = false ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.status != '임시저장' ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_request WHERE status != '임시저장'
SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.id = #{id}

SELECT pr.id, pr.code, pr.title, pr.status, pr.requested_delivery_date, pr.total_amount, pr.created_at, pr.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.id = #{id} AND pr.is_requested = false
SELECT id AS product_id, no, quantity, remarks, product_id FROM purchase_request_product WHERE purchase_request_id = #{requestId} ORDER BY no ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_request WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_request WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_request WHERE code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_request WHERE status = '임시저장'
